rpc_unavailable.title: Red RPC queue is unavailable
rpc_unavailable.description: Home Assistant cannot read queue data from Red RPC at {host}:{port}. Verify Red is running with --rpc and reachable from Home Assistant.

playlist_rpc_unavailable.title: Red RPC playlist API is unavailable
playlist_rpc_unavailable.description: Home Assistant cannot read playlist inventory from Red RPC at {host}:{port}. Verify Red is running with --rpc and the ha_red_rpc cog is loaded.
